fields.Name: Tag Distribution For Entity
fields.UserQuestion: What tags are most common on records of a given entity?
fields.Description: Aggregates tag counts across all records of a given entity, showing how many records have each tag along with average relevance weight and date range. Composable — use as a subquery or join to analyze topic distribution, category breakdowns, and tag popularity.
fields.TechnicalDescription: Groups vwTaggedItems by tag for a given entity name, joining to vwTags for display names and parent hierarchy. Returns COUNT, AVG(Weight), MIN/MAX tagged dates per tag. Only includes Active tags. No ORDER BY for composability — callers should add their own sorting (e.g., ORDER BY RecordCount DESC). Parameters: entityName (entity display name e.g. "Member Engagement Logs").
